reason_a: Image A shows only a raw markdown source block with no preview, no header, no styling — essentially a bare textarea.
reason_b: Image B presents a polished split-pane editor with dark header, themed editor panel, rendered HTML preview with proper typography, accent link color, and styled code block.
verdict: B delivers a complete, product-like markdown studio with clear hierarchy and dual-pane polish, while A looks like an unstyled draft.
